name: AP Invoice Processing
description: Accounting stages vendor invoice intake, work-order matching, coding review, and payment-run packets with approval gates before any payment, accounting write, or vendor-facing send.

stages.name: Normalize Invoice Intake
stages.description: Normalize invoice source facts and identify missing evidence before coding.

steps.title: Normalize invoice facts
steps.instructions: Normalize vendor, invoice number, amount, date, due date, property, unit, work-order refs, line items, tax, attachments, duplicate-risk flags, and source confidence. Missing invoice, vendor, work-order, or ledger data must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize invoice facts and missing-data flags. No payment, coding, vendor send, or accounting write.

steps.title: Check duplicate and vendor status
steps.instructions: Check duplicate invoice risk, vendor compliance, W-9 status, COI status, payment hold, and dispatch eligibility. Record unknowns as needs_verification; do not approve payment.
steps.dispatch_title: Check invoice duplicate and vendor status
steps.dispatch_body: Check duplicate and vendor compliance status. No payment or accounting write.

stages.name: Match And Code
stages.description: Match invoice to work order and prepare coding recommendation.

steps.title: Match invoice to work order
steps.instructions: Match invoice to work order, completion evidence, vendor notes, NTE/approval records, resident/owner impact, and closeout status. Do not close work orders or approve payment.
steps.dispatch_body: Match invoice to work-order evidence and approval records. No work-order closeout and no payment.

steps.title: Draft coding recommendation
steps.instructions: Draft GL/property/unit coding, billable/non-billable classification, owner chargeback caveats, reserve impact, payment priority, and missing-evidence notes. Draft-only; do not post coding.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft AP invoice coding recommendation. No accounting write and no payment.

steps.title: Review coding recommendation
steps.instructions: Review coding, ownership, work-order match, duplicate risk, NTE approval, missing evidence, and payment priority before payment packet staging.
steps.human_prompt: Review AP coding and invoice evidence before any payment or accounting action.

stages.name: Approve Payment Packet
stages.description: Human approval gates for payment, accounting write, and vendor communication.

steps.title: Prepare payment packet
steps.instructions: Prepare draft payment packet with invoice, coding, work-order evidence, approval history, duplicate check, vendor compliance, and payment recommendation. Do not initiate payment or post bill.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare AP payment packet for approval. No payment, bill post, or external send.

steps.title: Approve bill posting and payment
steps.instructions: Approve, hold, reject, or request edits before any bill posting, payment run, ACH/check action, owner chargeback, or vendor communication.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before bill posting, payment, owner chargeback, or vendor communication.

stages.name: Stage Approved Closeout
stages.description: Record approved packet metadata without executing payment or accounting writes.

steps.title: Stage approved AP actions
steps.instructions: Stage approved bill-posting refs, payment-run refs, hold reasons, owner chargeback notes, and vendor follow-up drafts for an operator release path. Do not post bills, initiate payment, or contact vendors.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved AP metadata only. No payment, accounting write, or external send.

steps.title: Record AP invoice outcome
steps.instructions: Record AP invoice outcome, approved holds, payment status metadata, missing-data follow-ups, and next checkpoint. Do not write to AppFolio or accounting systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal AP invoice outcome. No accounting write and no external send.
